description: Spaceship is a web services platform focused on domain registration and management, DNS, hosting, email, and domain marketplace features. Its public developer documentation currently centers on an API for managing domains, contacts, DNS records, transfers, and SellerHub listings.
summary: Spaceship exposes a public REST API for domain, DNS, contacts, async operations, and SellerHub management, plus two public MCP servers at Spaceship-operated endpoints.
